user-3.subject: Roaming charges not reflected in bill

faq.question: How do I check my data balance?
faq.answer: You can ask me anytime! Just type "check my usage" or "show my balance".

faq.question: How do I activate a new bundle?
faq.answer: Browse available bundles by asking "what bundles are available?" and select one to activate.

faq.question: How do I contact a live agent?
faq.answer: Say "connect me to an agent" and we'll route you to the next available representative.

faq.question: When is my next billing date?
faq.answer: Ask "show my balance" and your next billing date will be displayed alongside your current balance.

faq.question: Can I change my plan?
faq.answer: Yes! Ask "what bundles are available?" to see all plans. You can switch at any time and the new plan takes effect on your next billing date.
